title: sysfs should be mounted rw for privileged
body:
sysfs should be mounted rw for a privileged container.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, but @rhatdan should take a look at the mount spec too - he's worked more with that than me
@baude Your new test seems to be failing consistently on Travis - maybe something unique to ubuntu?
